name: Skewered Mozzarella with Canadian Bacon
recipeIngredient: 12 Slices of French bread (long and narrow)
12 Slices of raw tomato (1/2 inch slices)
2 Cans of tomato sauce (8 oz each)
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare four skewers, approximately 10-12 inches long.
2. Cut the French bread into 1/2 inch slices.
3. Slice the raw tomato to match the thickness of the bacon and bread (1/2 inch).
4. Cut each piece of cheese into 1-inch squares about 1/4 inch thick.
5. Fold a slice of Canadian bacon around each piece of cheese, pressing firmly to secure it in place.
6. Halve each piece of tomato and bread.
7. Heat the 1/3 cup of Salad oil in a large skillet over medium heat.
8. Brown the bread slices on both sides, turning them quickly to avoid burning. They should be lightly browned.
9. Thread alternating pieces of bacon, mozzarella, bread, and tomato onto each skewer, starting and ending with the bacon.
10. Place each skewer in a shallow baking pan or shallow earthenware dish, ensuring the folded top of the bacon is visible.
11. Pour tomato sauce over each skewer.
12. Sprinkle generously with grated parmesan cheese.
13. Drizzle lightly with paprika and additional salad oil.
14. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
15. Bake the skewers until browned on top, then serve immediately while hot.
